testcase.name: Story 1.2: PBAC System with 15 Capabilities (ATDD - RED PHASE) › [P0-E2E-025] should allow admin to assign multiple capabilities to user

failure.message: story-1.2-pbac-system.spec.ts:211:7 [P0-E2E-025] should allow admin to assign multiple capabilities to user

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › story-1.2-pbac-system.spec.ts:211:7 › Story 1.2: PBAC System with 15 Capabilities (ATDD - RED PHASE) › [P0-E2E-025] should allow admin to assign multiple capabilities to user
TimeoutError: page.waitForURL: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. =========================== logs =========================== waiting for navigation to "/usuarios" until "load" ============================================================
